title: First Click Breakthrough Fix Log

changes: TITLE: '$20,000 Loan at 8% for 5 Years: Calculate Your Exact Monthly Payment (Free Tool)' → '$20,000 Loan at 8% for 5 Years — See YOUR Monthly Payment & Full Schedule'
DESCRIPTION: Updated with 'See your personalized monthly payment' and 'YOUR exact loan' language
H2: 'Monthly Payment: $405.53 — Here's the Full Breakdown' → 'What's the Monthly Payment on a $20,000 Loan at 8% for 5 Years?' (question format — Google can't snippet the answer)
CTA: 'Try it yourself' → 'See YOUR exact payment' with stronger personalized language
page_1.reason: H2 was giving away $405.53 as snippet in SERP — users got answer without clicking. Changed to question to force click for answer.
page_1.expected_effect: CTR from 0% to 1-3% at pos 10.9 = 1-4 clicks/week

changes: TITLE: 'Rent vs Buy on a $100,000 Income: The 2026 Break-Even Analysis' → 'Rent vs Buy Calculator: Should You Rent or Buy a Home in 2026? (Free Tool)'
DESCRIPTION: Broadened from $100k-specific to general rent-vs-buy with personalized angle
page_2.reason: Only 2 impressions at pos 4.0 — title was too narrow ($100k income only). Broadened to capture 'rent vs buy calculator' queries while keeping unique value.
page_2.expected_effect: Impressions increase 10-50x as page matches broader queries; clicks follow at pos 4

changes: TITLE: 'How Much House Can I Afford? Get Your Max Budget — Free Calculator (2026)' → 'How Much House Can I Afford? Free Calculator — See Your Max Budget (2026)'
DESCRIPTION: Stronger action language 'instantly see', 'YOUR exact number', 'no personal data required'
page_3.reason: 4 impressions at pos 7.5 — title was passive ('Get Your Max Budget'). Made more action-oriented ('See Your Max Budget') and added privacy signal.
page_3.expected_effect: Small CTR improvement at pos 7.5; impressions may grow with stronger title match

measurement_start: After Google recrawls (est. 3-10 days for blog, 7-21 days for decision pages)
